pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Visão's Ocean of Hope Initiative

pageCaption.value: OCEAN OF HOPE is a project launched by the Portuguese magazine company VISÃO in partnership with Rolex, within the scope of its Perpetual Planet initiative, to give voice to the extraordinary individuals and organisations who are working to build a more sustainable planet and future.

metadescription.value: Together with Visão, Rolex has launched the Ocean of Hope project to give voice to extraordinary individuals and organisations. Discover more on rolex.org.

text.value: Oceano de Esperança is a project launched by the Portuguese magazine company Visão in partnership with Rolex, within the scope of its Perpetual Planet initiative, to give voice to the extraordinary individuals and organisations who are working to build a more sustainable planet and future.

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - The blue heart of our planet

pageCaption.value: Sylvia Earle has received more than 32 honorary degrees and has over 225 scientific and technical publications to her name.

WaPageTitle.value: Sylvia Earle, Legendary Pioneer Of Underwater Exploration

metadescription.value: Pioneer of underwater exploration, Sylvia Earle is on a mission to protect the oceans through a network of hope spots. More on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Sylvia Earle, Legendary Pioneer Of Underwater Exploration

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Protecting nature alongside local communities

pageCaption.value: At 36 years old, João Campos-Silva is on a mission to save the giant fish of the Amazon. And, with it, the whole ecosystem of the river.

metadescription.value: Rolex Laureate João Campos-Silva's project has helped the Amazon ecosystem, benefitting local communities in the process. See more on rolex.org.

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - A lifetime of defending penguin populations

pageCaption.value: 14 of the 18 species of penguins in the world are at risk. Pablo García Borboroglu made it his mission to save them.

WaPageTitle.value: Penguins face threats at sea and on land

metadescription.value: Biologist Pablo García Borboroglu has dedicated his life to saving penguins and raising awareness about their decline. See more on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Penguins face threats at sea and on land

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - A biologist's race to save the corals

pageCaption.value: A young English biologist is in a race to save the Great Barrier Reef in Australia. Will she manage in time?

WaPageTitle.value: "Within a week, healthy and vibrant corals had turned white"

metadescription.value: The Great Barrier Reef is the world's largest living organism. See how Rolex Laureate Emma Camp hopes to help these corals survive on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Within a week, healthy and vibrant corals had turned white
